title: Tao Te Ching 80: The Small State
description: The Taoist utopia: a small country where people are content, never traveling to the neighboring village whose roosters they can hear.
introduction: The Taoist utopia: a small country where people are content, never traveling to the neighboring village whose roosters they can hear.

translation.original_text: 小國寡民。使有什伯之器而不用。使民重死而不遠徙。
translation.text: A small country with few people. Let them have tools tenfold but not use them. Let the people value death and not travel far.
